languages.text: "Что ж, эксперимент завершен, и я нахожу его итог вполне удовлетворительным". {n}Эоганн складывает руки на объемистом животе, вежливо кланяясь вам.{/n} "Благодарю за столь своевременное появление, Вольный Торговец. Вы даровали мне пищу для размышлений, которая надолго займет мой беспокойный ум и, без сомнения, дарует немало откровений в будущем. А теперь мне нужно вернуться в лабораторию и подробно обсудить результаты с Нунциусом".

"And so, the experiment is complete, and I deem the outcome wholly satisfactory." {n}Eogunn folds his arms over his sizeable stomach, giving you a polite bow.{/n} "Thank you for your so timely arrival, Rogue Trader. You have given me food for thought that will occupy my unquiet mind for a long time to come, and will surely grant me many revelations in the future. Now I must return to the laboratory and discuss the results in detail with Nuncius."
languages.original_text: "Что ж, эксперимент завершен, и я нахожу его итог вполне удовлетворительным". {n}Эоганн складывает руки на объемистом животе, вежливо кланяясь вам.{/n} "Благодарю за столь своевременное появление, Вольный Торговец. Вы даровали мне пищу для размышлений, которая надолго займет мой беспокойный ум и, без сомнения, дарует немало откровений в будущем. А теперь мне нужно вернуться в лабораторию и подробно обсудить результаты с Нунциусом".

traits.locale_text: "And so, the experiment is complete, and I deem the outcome wholly satisfactory." {n}Eogunn folds his arms over his sizeable stomach, giving you a polite bow.{/n} "Thank you for your so timely arrival, Rogue Trader. You have given me food for thought that will occupy my unquiet mind for a long time to come, and will surely grant me many revelations in the future. Now I must return to the laboratory and discuss the results in detail with Nuncius."

"And so, the experiment is complete, and I deem the outcome wholly satisfactory." {n}Eogunn folds his arms over his sizeable stomach, giving you a polite bow.{/n} "Thank you for your so timely arrival, Rogue Trader. You have given me food for thought that will occupy my unquiet mind for a long time to come, and will surely grant me many revelations in the future. Now I must return to the laboratory and discuss the results in detail with Nuncius."

"And so, the experiment is complete, and I deem the outcome wholly satisfactory." {n}Eogunn folds his arms over his sizeable stomach, giving you a polite bow.{/n} "Thank you for your so timely arrival, Rogue Trader. You have given me food for thought that will occupy my unquiet mind for a long time to come, and will surely grant me many revelations in the future. Now I must return to the laboratory and discuss the results in detail with Nuncius."

languages.text: "Damit ist das Experiment beendet und ich betrachte das Ergebnis als durchwegs zufriedenstellend." {n}Eogunn verschränkt die Arme über seinem beachtlichen Bauch und nickt dir höflich zu.{/n} "Danke für Euer rechtzeitiges Eintreffen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ihr habt mir Gedankennahrung geliefert, die meinen rastlosen Verstand lange beschäftigen und mir zukünftig gewiss viele Offenbarungen gewähren wird. Ich muss jetzt in das Labor zurück und die Ergebnisse im Detail mit Nuncius besprechen."
languages.original_text: "And so, the experiment is complete, and I deem the outcome wholly satisfactory." {n}Eogunn folds his arms over his sizeable stomach, giving you a polite bow.{/n} "Thank you for your so timely arrival, Rogue Trader. You have given me food for thought that will occupy my unquiet mind for a long time to come, and will surely grant me many revelations in the future. Now I must return to the laboratory and discuss the results in detail with Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: "Damit ist das Experiment beendet und ich betrachte das Ergebnis als durchwegs zufriedenstellend." {n}Eogunn verschränkt die Arme über seinem beachtlichen Bauch und nickt dir höflich zu.{/n} "Danke für Euer rechtzeitiges Eintreffen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ihr habt mir Gedankennahrung geliefert, die meinen rastlosen Verstand lange beschäftigen und mir zukünftig gewiss viele Offenbarungen gewähren wird. Ich muss jetzt in das Labor zurück und die Ergebnisse im Detail mit Nuncius besprechen."

languages.text: « Sur ce, l'expérience est terminée, et son résultat me paraît pleinement satisfaisant. » {n}Eogunn croise les bras sur son ventre proéminent et s'incline poliment devant vous.{/n} « Merci, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Vous êtes {mf|arrivé|arrivée} au moment idéal. Votre intervention a soulevé des sujets de réflexion qui m'occuperont longtemps et devraient m'ouvrir bien des révélations à l'avenir. Maintenant, je dois retourner au laboratoire et discuter en détail des résultats avec Nuncius. »
languages.original_text: "And so, the experiment is complete, and I deem the outcome wholly satisfactory." {n}Eogunn folds his arms over his sizeable stomach, giving you a polite bow.{/n} "Thank you for your so timely arrival, Rogue Trader. You have given me food for thought that will occupy my unquiet mind for a long time to come, and will surely grant me many revelations in the future. Now I must return to the laboratory and discuss the results in detail with Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: « Sur ce, l'expérience est terminée, et son résultat me paraît pleinement satisfaisant. » {n}Eogunn croise les bras sur son ventre proéminent et s'incline poliment devant vous.{/n} « Merci, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Vous êtes {mf|arrivé|arrivée} au moment idéal. Votre intervention a soulevé des sujets de réflexion qui m'occuperont longtemps et devraient m'ouvrir bien des révélations à l'avenir. Maintenant, je dois retourner au laboratoire et discuter en détail des résultats avec Nuncius. »

languages.text: “至此，实验完成，我认为结果完全令人满意。”{n}伊奥贡将双臂交叠于浑圆的腹部之上，向你礼貌地微微躬身。{/n}“感谢您恰到好处的来访，行商浪人。您给了我思考的食粮，这将在我不安分的头脑中占据很长时间，未来必将带给我诸多新的启示。现在，我必须返回实验室，与努恩修斯对结果进行深入分析。”
languages.original_text: "And so, the experiment is complete, and I deem the outcome wholly satisfactory." {n}Eogunn folds his arms over his sizeable stomach, giving you a polite bow.{/n} "Thank you for your so timely arrival, Rogue Trader. You have given me food for thought that will occupy my unquiet mind for a long time to come, and will surely grant me many revelations in the future. Now I must return to the laboratory and discuss the results in detail with Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: “至此，实验完成，我认为结果完全令人满意。”{n}伊奥贡将双臂交叠于浑圆的腹部之上，向你礼貌地微微躬身。{/n}“感谢您恰到好处的来访，行商浪人。您给了我思考的食粮，这将在我不安分的头脑中占据很长时间，未来必将带给我诸多新的启示。现在，我必须返回实验室，与努恩修斯对结果进行深入分析。”

languages.text: «Con esto termina el experimento, cuyo resultado considero plenamente satisfactorio». {n}Eogunn cruza los brazos sobre su voluminoso estómago y te hace una educada reverencia.{/n} «Gracias por su puntual llegada, Comerciante Independiente. Me ha dado algo en lo que pensar que ocupará mi mente durante mucho tiempo y que seguramente conducirá a numerosas revelaciones. Ahora debo volver al laboratorio para hablar con Nuncius sobre los resultados».
languages.original_text: "And so, the experiment is complete, and I deem the outcome wholly satisfactory." {n}Eogunn folds his arms over his sizeable stomach, giving you a polite bow.{/n} "Thank you for your so timely arrival, Rogue Trader. You have given me food for thought that will occupy my unquiet mind for a long time to come, and will surely grant me many revelations in the future. Now I must return to the laboratory and discuss the results in detail with Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: «Con esto termina el experimento, cuyo resultado considero plenamente satisfactorio». {n}Eogunn cruza los brazos sobre su voluminoso estómago y te hace una educada reverencia.{/n} «Gracias por su puntual llegada, Comerciante Independiente. Me ha dado algo en lo que pensar que ocupará mi mente durante mucho tiempo y que seguramente conducirá a numerosas revelaciones. Ahora debo volver al laboratorio para hablar con Nuncius sobre los resultados».

languages.text: 「さて、実験は完了し、その結果は完全に満足のいくものだと判断する。」{n}エオガンは大きな腹の上で腕を組み、君に丁寧なお辞儀をする。{/n}「実に時宜を得た登場に感謝する、ローグ・トレーダー。君は、この先長らく我が安らがぬ精神を占めるであろう思索の糧を与えてくれた。それはきっと将来、多くの啓示を私にもたらすだろう。さて、私は研究室に戻り、ヌンキウスと結果を詳しく論じ合わねばならない。」
languages.original_text: "And so, the experiment is complete, and I deem the outcome wholly satisfactory." {n}Eogunn folds his arms over his sizeable stomach, giving you a polite bow.{/n} "Thank you for your so timely arrival, Rogue Trader. You have given me food for thought that will occupy my unquiet mind for a long time to come, and will surely grant me many revelations in the future. Now I must return to the laboratory and discuss the results in detail with Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: 「さて、実験は完了し、その結果は完全に満足のいくものだと判断する。」{n}エオガンは大きな腹の上で腕を組み、君に丁寧なお辞儀をする。{/n}「実に時宜を得た登場に感謝する、ローグ・トレーダー。君は、この先長らく我が安らがぬ精神を占めるであろう思索の糧を与えてくれた。それはきっと将来、多くの啓示を私にもたらすだろう。さて、私は研究室に戻り、ヌンキウスと結果を詳しく論じ合わねばならない。」

languages.text: "Deney tamamlandı. Sonucu tamamıyla tatmin edici buluyorum." {n}Eogunn, kollarını iri göbeğinin üzerinde kavuşturarak kibarca başını eğiyor.{/n} "Zamanında geldiğiniz için teşekkür ederim Hür Tacir. Bana huzursuz zihnimi daha uzun süre meşgul edecek ve gelecekte bana kesinlikle pek çok vahiy bahşedecek düşünceler bahşettiniz. Şimdi laboratuvara dönmeli ve sonuçları Nuncius ile ayrıntılı olarak konuşmalıyım."
languages.original_text: "And so, the experiment is complete, and I deem the outcome wholly satisfactory." {n}Eogunn folds his arms over his sizeable stomach, giving you a polite bow.{/n} "Thank you for your so timely arrival, Rogue Trader. You have given me food for thought that will occupy my unquiet mind for a long time to come, and will surely grant me many revelations in the future. Now I must return to the laboratory and discuss the results in detail with Nuncius."

traits.locale_text: "Deney tamamlandı. Sonucu tamamıyla tatmin edici buluyorum." {n}Eogunn, kollarını iri göbeğinin üzerinde kavuşturarak kibarca başını eğiyor.{/n} "Zamanında geldiğiniz için teşekkür ederim Hür Tacir. Bana huzursuz zihnimi daha uzun süre meşgul edecek ve gelecekte bana kesinlikle pek çok vahiy bahşedecek düşünceler bahşettiniz. Şimdi laboratuvara dönmeli ve sonuçları Nuncius ile ayrıntılı olarak konuşmalıyım."
